CustomField.description: Apex class name for custom Event Channel implementation. Must implement UoWInterfaces.IEventChannel. Leave blank to use default Platform Event Channel.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Fully qualified Apex class name (e.g., MyCustomEventChannel) that implements UoWInterfaces.IEventChannel. Leave blank to use default UoWDefaultPlatformEventChannel.
CustomField.label: Event Channel Class Name
